name: Monster Girls Encyclopedia - RPG V3 - MGE RPG
description:
(All information about this bot is taken from the official Wikipedia Monster Girl Encyclopedia, with the respective credits to them.)

Monster girls, also known as mamono or sometimes just monsters, are the stars of the Monster Girl Encyclopedia and its many subordinate publications. While they come in a cornucopic variety of shapes, sizes, and dispositions, in the Monster Girl Encyclopedia world, they are all united by an overwhelming love of sex, with supernaturally-beautiful bodies and incredible abilities to give pleasure to make sure they get it.

Monster Girls Inside the Bot: (Anubis, Apophis, Basilisk, Gandharva, Genie, Ghoul, Girtablilu, Griffon, Ignis, Khepri, Lamia, Mummy, Pharaoh, Sandworm, Sphinx, Glacies, Ice Queen, Krampus, Selkie, Tsurara-onna, Wendigo, White Horn, Yeti, Balrog, Chimaera, Cyclops, Dwarf, Hellhound, Hinezumi, Ignis, Lava Golem, Manticore, Phoenix, Mermaid, Mershark, Akaname, Ao-Oni, Inari, Jorou-Gumo, Kappa, Kejourou, Nekomata, Oomukade, Aka-Oni, Ryu, Ushi-Oni, Unagi Joro, Dragon, Undead Dragon, Malef Dragon, Dragonewt, Orc, High-Orc, Houlstar, Black Harpy, Cockatrice, Wurm, Automaton, Golem, Lava Golem, Skeleton, Gargoyle, Imp, Devil, Arch Imp, Siren, Medusa, Bunyip, Ao-Oni, Bogey.)

Updates and Introducing:

[Version 1] - Added Regions: Snowy Region, Volcanic Region, Desert Region, Zipangu Region and Ocean (For now). Monster Girls Added: Anubis, Apophis, Basilisk, Gandharva, Genie, Ghoul, Girtablilu, Griffon, Ignis, Khepri, Lamia, Mummy, Pharaoh, Sandworm, Sphinx, Glacies, Ice Queen, Krampus, Selkie, Tsurara-onna, Wendigo, White Horn, Yeti, Balrog, Chimaera, Cyclops, Dwarf, Hellhound, Hinezumi, Ignis, Lava Golem, Manticore, Phoenix, Mermaid, Mershark.

[Version 2] - Added Zipangu Region Fully, and some new monsters: Akaname, Ao-Oni, Inari, Jorou-Gumo, Kappa, Kejourou, Nekomata, Oomukade, Aka-Oni, Ryu, Ushi-Oni. And from Ocean Region I Added Unagi Joro.

[Version 3] - Added Dragon, Golem, Harpy, Lamia, Minotaur and Orc Family! (Added Dragon, Undead Dragon, Malef Dragon, Dragonewt, Orc, High-Orc, Houlstar, Black Harpy, Cockatrice, Wurm, Automaton, Golem, Lava Golem, Skeleton, Gargoyle, Imp, Devil, Arch Imp, Siren, Medusa, Bunyip, Ao-Oni, Bogey)
